title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Ahmedabad - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Ahmedabad - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!
